args.code: (() => { const body = document.body ? document.body.innerText : ""; const text = body.slice(0,12000); const title = (document.querySelector("#productTitle")?.innerText || document.title || "").trim(); const sels = ["#corePriceDisplay_desktop_feature_div .a-price .a-offscreen","#corePriceDisplay_desktop_feature_div","#apex_desktop .a-price .a-offscreen",".a-price .a-offscreen"]; const prices = sels.map(sel => ({sel, text: Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(sel)).map(e => (e.innerText || e.textContent || "").trim()).filter(Boolean).slice(0,5)})); const img = document.querySelector("#landingImage")?.src || document.querySelector("#imgTagWrapperId img")?.src || ""; return JSON.stringify({url: location.href, title, prices, img, flags:{captcha:/captcha|robot check|enter the characters/i.test(text), unavailable:/currently unavailable|unavailable/i.test(text)}, snippet:text.slice(0,2000)}); })()
